summary.shape_sentence: Early spike-and-whipsaw resolved into a late-morning high, then a broad afternoon liquidation with only a partial late reclaim into the close.

goat.note: Cleanest move was the post-HOD downside expansion from the 25900-plus supply area into the 25775 demand zone.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots clustered around the late-morning HOD rejection and lower-high breakdowns after noon.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots appeared mainly after flushes into 25775-25790 demand, producing corrective bounces rather than trend reversal.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: 25900-25922 acted as primary supply and was respected; 25825-25840 became secondary afternoon resistance.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: 25775-25790 was defended during the afternoon lows, but the response failed to reclaim the open.

time_markers.10am_blue: Post-open whipsaw was stabilizing; price was rebuilding upward near 25830-25850 after the opening flush.
time_markers.12pm_red: Near the major HOD rejection; control shifted from buyers to sellers.
time_markers.2pm_green: Lower-high structure remained active, with price drifting toward the later LOD test.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 25802.50 after a failed late reclaim, below the open and far below the HOD.

takeaway: Bearish reversal day after a strong morning auction: late-morning supply capped the session, afternoon liquidation swept into demand, and the close showed only a partial reclaim rather than a true reversal.
